features.name: combinational signal depending on registered output
features.description: Code should include a combinational assign that depends on a signal registered in a clocked always_ff block where the combinational signal is also read
features.snippet:
assign temp = (test_ff == 0) || (external_en && (external_id==id));
always_ff @(posedge clk) begin if (temp) test_ff <= data; end

features.name: duplicated combinational logic in assign and always_ff condition
features.description: Code should include the same boolean expression used both as a continuous assign and inside an always_ff block condition
features.snippet:
assign temp = (test_ff == 0) || (external_en && (external_id==id));
always_ff @(posedge clk) if ((test_ff == 0) || (external_en && (external_id==id))) id <= counter[3:0];
